prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes asset prices follow a log-normal distribution. Historical daily log returns for LMT over the past 2 years were analyzed. From this data, an annualized drift (mean log return) of 0.1983 and an annualized volatility (standard deviation of log returns) of 0.1881 were calculated. These parameters were used to project the price for 18 days (approximately 18 trading days), starting from the current price of $657.16. The confidence intervals represent the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probability, according to the model's assumptions.
